subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole supports the signal head, casting a short hard midday shadow, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex bright and matte-glossy in the strong midday sun; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A clean suburban arterial intersection under bright clear midday summer skies. The fresh dark asphalt is dry, bearing a crisp painted white stop line and lane markings, flanked by curbs, a sidewalk, low retail buildings and green street trees. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The high sun casts short, hard shadows straight down onto the pavement.

lighting.direction: Sun nearly overhead, casting short hard shadows directly beneath objects
lighting.shadows: Short, crisp, high-contrast shadows of the post, signal head, and balloons pooled tightly under them, stable throughout
lighting.illumination_effect: Harsh overhead daylight that keeps the red lamp clearly visible and makes the balloon colors pop vividly

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Bright high-key palette of warm red lamp, vivid balloon colors, gray asphalt, green foliage and deep blue sky
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, bright, orderly, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, red lamp, and overlapping green balloon

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the sunlit suburban arterial, approaching the intersection where the red light is illuminated under the bright midday sun and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the balloons continue to sway in the warm summer breeze.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the suburban intersection under bright midday sun; the single traffic light displays a steady red, with party balloons tied to the post swaying in the warm breeze.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on dry fresh asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping balloon is clearly framed against the blue sky.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move in the summer breeze.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a sunlit suburban arterial under bright midday summer skies toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the warm breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the balloons still gently bobbing under short, hard midday shadows.
audio_description: Ambient suburban summer sounds: a light warm breeze, faint distant traffic, cicadas, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Occasional light rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
